candidates.why: A separate depreciation line exists at the same level as Cost of Revenues and SG&A-like rows, but nothing indicates it is specifically COGS-related. Using it for COGS would risk misallocating a company-wide operating depreciation line.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS-specific depreciation/amortisation row is shown. The visible depreciation appears as a separate operating expense line, not clearly within or attributable specifically to the selected COGS bucket 'Cost of Revenues'.

candidates.why: This appears as a separate same-level operating expense line outside the selected XSGA component rows ('Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses' and 'Other operating Expenses'), so it should be added separately rather than assumed embedded. There are two 'Depreciation' rows, and the larger one matches the sum of the lower 'Depreciation' row plus 'Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets', so the summary row should be preferred to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets
candidates.why: This looks like a component of the summary depreciation row, so it should not be selected if the summary depreciation row is used.

variables.notes: Selected only the summary depreciation row to avoid double counting with the separate right-of-use asset depreciation component. The selected XSGA bucket consists only of labor and other operating expenses, so this separate depreciation line should be added separately.
